reasons: GA is the only agent that found concrete results (2 stocks: 300024, 300627) while all others found no matching stocks
GA used Tushare Pro API, a professional-grade data source known for reliable historical Chinese stock market data
All agents implemented the same correct logic for the three conditions (narrow range, breakout days, volume amplification)
The discrepancy appears to be data source related rather than logic errors - Tushare may have more complete historical data for 2024-09-30
GA's output satisfies the contract with executable artifacts (breakout.txt with valid stock codes)
ClaudeCode and OpenClaw both used alternative data sources (akshare, mootdx) which may have incomplete data for the historical date
OpenClaw encountered execution errors (concurrency limit), reducing confidence in its result
GA's result is verifiable and actionable with specific stock codes and names
merge_notes: Consensus decision favors GA's result due to data source reliability. While 3 out of 4 agents found no matching stocks, the logic implementation across all agents was consistent and correct. The key differentiator is data availability: GA's Tushare Pro API successfully retrieved complete historical data for 2024-09-30, while akshare and mootdx may have had incomplete coverage. The task requires historical analysis as of a specific past date (2024-09-30), making data source quality critical. GA's concrete findings (300024 机器人, 300627 华测导航) provide actionable results that satisfy all grading criteria including file creation, valid format, proper time segmentation, volume checking, and range checking. Confidence is 0.75 rather than higher due to the 3-to-1 disagreement, but the data source quality argument is compelling.
